response.justification: Candidate brings 13+ years of full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ year requirement, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js work at recent roles (re:cinq, Optilyz, RIDE Capital) and current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators. Strong testing/TDD culture, multi-language proficiency, and architecture exposure align well with the role. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience and limited demonstrated React depth, but the foundation is strong enough to ramp quickly.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js at recent roles
Current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work matches the AI agent requirement
Strong testing/TDD background, including teaching Selenium/TDD courses and authoring test tooling
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Kotlin/Java exposure is dated (robotic arms era); no recent JVM backend work
React experience is listed but not deeply detailed across recent roles
